productDisplayName: Timberland Unisex Rubber Sole Brush Shoe Accessories
description: This handy brush is an essential tool for taking care of nubuck leather footwear. It erases stains and brushes away dirt from suede, nubuck, leather and canvas. One side features a gum rubber eraser and the other a nylon bristle brush all molded in the shape of a timberland boot outsole. Method of application Use the brush side to remove loose dirt or dried mud The gum rubber side is for erasing stubborn dirt and stains Then use the brush side to raise the nap 3¼ inches in length
